tightband_eval.conclusion: AR(1) fixed-point is anti-correlated with outcomes on trending markets. Game prices trend to 0/1, not mean-revert. CIO fires at 67% elapsed, below coin-flip accuracy. C7 excluded from DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS.
tightband_eval.next_direction: Replace AR(1) with a momentum-aware model (trend extrapolation gated by S0 lyapunov divergence instead of convergence certificate). Re-test on in-game markets where trend = information.
